site.name: BadgerNet 4.0
site.tagline: Where UW–Madison students and alumni go — data-driven views (in progress).

methodology_blurb: This app loads static JSON from /data. Six top-level tabs: Industry, Post-grad education, International outcomes, and three Student origins levels (UG, grad, doctorate). Trend charts use 1y / 5y / 10y-style series (synthetic until real pipelines land). International outcomes target non–U.S. citizens from abroad; LinkedIn harvest is aggregate-only, no API.
